aesthetic: Monument — brutalist architecture, weight-800 monumentality, pure black & white
principles: Weight 800 titles — the heaviest, most architectural
Only black #000 and white #fff — no grays (gray is compromise)
Electric blue #0070f3 for one highlight per page only
Manifesto tone: declarative, no questions, no exclamations
promptGuide: Apply the Monument aesthetic: Bricolage Grotesque weight 800 display (80-120px on covers), Familjen Grotesk weight 400 body, extreme weight contrast (800 vs 400), letter-spacing -0.04em (most aggressive negative tracking), titles can split 2-3 lines (2-3 words each) for monumental stacking, left-aligned (never center), 0-2px border-radius, shadow-as-border (0 0 0 1px ring), only #000 and #fff (blue #0070f3 for one element only), manifesto tone: verb-first, ≤5 words, no questions/exclamations.
